{{Navbox | bodyclass = | name = Burmese nats | title = [[Nat (deity)|Nats]] and spirits of [[Burmese folk religion]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Mount_Popa_Nat_Worship.jpg|128px|]]
| group1 = Official pantheon | list1 = * [[Thagyamin]] ([[Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra]]) * [[Mahagiri]] * [[Hnamadawgyi]] * [[Shwe Nabay]] (Naga Medaw) * [[Thonbanhla]] * [[Taungoo Mingaung]] * [[Tarabya of Ava|Mintara]] * [[Thandawgan]] * [[Shwe Nawrahta]] * [[Aungzwamagyi]] * [[Kyawswa I of Pinya|Ngazishin]] * [[Thihathu of Ava|Aung Pinle Hsinbyushin]] * [[Taungmagyi]] (Shin Nyo) * [[Maungminshin]] (Shin Byu) * [[Shindaw]] * [[Nyaunggyin]] * [[Tabinshwehti]] * [[Minye Aungdin]] * [[Shwe Sitthin]] * [[Medaw Shwezaga]] * [[Maung Po Tu]] * [[Yun Bayin]] (Mekuti) * [[Maung Minbyu]] * [[Mandalay Bodaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw]] * [[Mintha Maungshin]] * [[Htibyuhsaung]] * [[Htibyuhsaung Medaw]] * [[Pareinma Shin Mingaung]] * [[Min Sithu]] * [[Min Kyawzwa]] * [[Myaukhpet Shinma]] * [[Anauk Mibaya]] * [[Shingon (nat)|Shingon]] * [[Shingwa]] * [[Shin Nemi]] (Ma Hnelay)
| group2 = [[Hinduism|Hindu]] [[Deva (Hinduism)|nats]] | list2 = * [[Vishnu|Beikthano]] * [[Brahma|Byamma]] * [[Ganesha|Maha Peinne]] * [[Chandi|Sandi]] * [[Shiva|Thiwa]] ([[Ishvara|Paramethwa]]) * [[Thurathadi|Thuyathadi]] * [[Kartikeya|Thukanda]]
| group3 = Other nats | list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle =
|group1 = Popa nats |list1 = * [[Popa Medaw]] (Me Wunna) * [[Koyin Maung]] * [[Taungdaw Thakhinma]] |group2 = Ayeyarwady Delta nats |list2 = * [[U Shin Gyi]] * [[Kwin Paing Ahpo]] |group3 = Bago nats |list3 = *[[Bago Medaw]] (Nankaraing Medaw) *[[Ko Aung Naing]] |group4 = Nine Towns nats |list4 = * Ko Myo Shin * Pale Yin (Amay Pale) * Hkuncho * Hkuntha |group5 = Lord of the</br>White Horse nats |list5 = * Yamma Myinbyushin * Kanni Myinbyushin * Shwepyay Myinbyushin * [[Shwe Sitthin|Shwesitthin Myinbyushin]] |group6 = Five Mother nats |list6 = * [[Ashay Medaw]] * [[Amay Yay Yin|Anauk Medaw]] ([[Amay Yay Yin]]) * [[Taung Medaw]] * [[Myauk Medaw]] * [[Amay Gyan]] }} | group4 = Miscellaneous | list4 = * [[Shin Upagutta]] * [[Sīvali|Shin Thiwali]] * [[Panhtwar|Beikthano Nat]] * [[Ponmagyi]] * [[Bo Bo Gyi]] * [[Koe Thein Shin]] * [[U Din Kyaw Khaung]] * [[Avalokiteśvara|Lawka Nat]] * [[Lay Kyun Maung]] * [[Ma Ngwe Taung]] * [[Medaw Lay Ba]] * [[Mogaung Kyawzwa]] * [[Mya Nan Nwe]] * [[Pakhan U Min Gyaw]] * [[Shinma Aungphyu]] * [[Ma Phae Wah]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings]] * [[:en:Akathaso|Akathaso]] * [[Bhummaso]] * [[Yokkaso]] * [[Phra Mae Thorani|Wathondare]] * [[Manimekhala|Mani Maykhala]] * [[Kayin Maunghnama]] * [[Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama]] * [[Pyelepyin Maunghnama]] }}<noinclude>

| group1 = Official pantheon | list1 = * [[Thagyamin]] ([[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra]]) * [[:en:Mahagiri|Mahagiri]] * [[:en:Hnamadawgyi|Hnamadawgyi]] * [[Shwe Nabay]] (Naga Medaw) * [[Thonbanhla]] * [[Taungoo Mingaung]] * [[Tarabya of Ava|Mintara]] * [[Thandawgan]] * [[Shwe Nawrahta]] * [[:en:Aungzwamagyi|Aungzwamagyi]] * [[:en:Kyawswa I of Pinya|Ngazishin]] * [[Thihathu of Ava|Aung Pinle Hsinbyushin]] * [[Taungmagyi]] (Shin Nyo) * [[:en:Maungminshin|Maungminshin]] (Shin Byu) * [[Shindaw]] * [[Nyaunggyin]] * [[Tabinshwehti]] * [[:en:Minye Aungdin|Minye Aungdin]] * [[Shwe Sitthin]] * [[:en:Medaw Shwezaga|Medaw Shwezaga]] * [[:en:Maung Po Tu|Maung Po Tu]] * [[Yun Bayin]] (Mekuti) * [[:en:Maung Minbyu|Maung Minbyu]] * [[:en:Mandalay Bodaw|Mandalay Bodaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw]] * [[:en:Mintha Maungshin|Mintha Maungshin]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung|Htibyuhsaung]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung Medaw|Htibyuhsaung Medaw]] * [[Pareinma Shin Mingaung]] * [[:en:Min Sithu|Min Sithu]] * [[:en:Min Kyawzwa|Min Kyawzwa]] * [[Myaukhpet Shinma]] * [[:en:Anauk Mibaya|Anauk Mibaya]] * [[Shingon (nat)|Shingon]] * [[Shingwa]] * [[Shin Nemi]] (Ma Hnelay)
| group2 = [[:en:Hinduism|Hindu]] [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|nats]] | list2 = * [[Vishnu|Beikthano]] * [[:en:Brahma|Byamma]] * [[:en:Ganesha|Maha Peinne]] * [[:en:Chandi|Sandi]] * [[Shiva|Thiwa]] ([[:en:Ishvara|Paramethwa]]) * [[Thurathadi|Thuyathadi]] * [[:en:Kartikeya|Thukanda]]
| group3 = Other nats | list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle =
|group1 = Popa nats |list1 = * [[Popa Medaw]] (Me Wunna) * [[Koyin Maung]] * [[Taungdaw Thakhinma]] |group2 = Ayeyarwady Delta nats |list2 = * [[U Shin Gyi]] * [[Kwin Paing Ahpo]] |group3 = Bago nats |list3 = *[[:en:Bago Medaw|Bago Medaw]] (Nankaraing Medaw) *[[Ko Aung Naing]] |group4 = Nine Towns nats |list4 = * Ko Myo Shin * Pale Yin (Amay Pale) * Hkuncho * Hkuntha |group5 = Lord of the</br>White Horse nats |list5 = * Yamma Myinbyushin * Kanni Myinbyushin * Shwepyay Myinbyushin * [[Shwe Sitthin|Shwesitthin Myinbyushin]] |group6 = Five Mother nats |list6 = * [[Ashay Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Anauk Medaw]] ([[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Amay Yay Yin]]) * [[Taung Medaw]] * [[Myauk Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Gyan|Amay Gyan]] }} | group4 = Miscellaneous | list4 = * [[Shin Upagutta]] * [[Sīvali|Shin Thiwali]] * [[Panhtwar|Beikthano Nat]] * [[Ponmagyi]] * [[:en:Bo Bo Gyi|Bo Bo Gyi]] * [[Koe Thein Shin]] * [[U Din Kyaw Khaung]] * [[:en:Avalokiteśvara|Lawka Nat]] * [[Lay Kyun Maung]] * [[:en:Ma Ngwe Taung|Ma Ngwe Taung]] * [[Medaw Lay Ba]] * [[Mogaung Kyawzwa]] * [[Mya Nan Nwe]] * [[Pakhan U Min Gyaw]] * [[Shinma Aungphyu]] * [[:en:Ma Phae Wah|Ma Phae Wah]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings]] * [[:en:Akathaso|Akathaso]] * [[:en:Bhummaso|Bhummaso]] * [[Yokkaso]] * [[Phra Mae Thorani|Wathondare]] * [[:en:Manimekhala|Mani Maykhala]] * [[:en:Kayin Maunghnama|Kayin Maunghnama]] * [[Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama]] * [[Pyelepyin Maunghnama]] }}<noinclude>

| group1 = Official pantheon | list1 = * [[Thagyamin]] ([[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra]]) * [[:en:Mahagiri|Mahagiri]] * [[:en:Hnamadawgyi|Hnamadawgyi]] * [[Shwe Nabay]] (Naga Medaw) * [[Thonbanhla]] * [[Taungoo Mingaung]] * [[Tarabya of Ava|Mintara]] * [[Thandawgan]] * [[Shwe Nawrahta]] * [[:en:Aungzwamagyi|Aungzwamagyi]] * [[:en:Kyawswa I of Pinya|Ngazishin]] * [[Thihathu of Ava|Aung Pinle Hsinbyushin]] * [[Taungmagyi]] (Shin Nyo) * [[:en:Maungminshin|Maungminshin]] (Shin Byu) * [[Shindaw]] * [[:en:Nyaunggyin|Nyaunggyin]] * [[Tabinshwehti]] * [[:en:Minye Aungdin|Minye Aungdin]] * [[Shwe Sitthin]] * [[:en:Medaw Shwezaga|Medaw Shwezaga]] * [[:en:Maung Po Tu|Maung Po Tu]] * [[Yun Bayin]] (Mekuti) * [[:en:Maung Minbyu|Maung Minbyu]] * [[:en:Mandalay Bodaw|Mandalay Bodaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw]] * [[:en:Mintha Maungshin|Mintha Maungshin]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung|Htibyuhsaung]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung Medaw|Htibyuhsaung Medaw]] * [[:en:Pareinma Shin Mingaung|Pareinma Shin Mingaung]] * [[:en:Min Sithu|Min Sithu]] * [[:en:Min Kyawzwa|Min Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Myaukhpet Shinma|Myaukhpet Shinma]] * [[:en:Anauk Mibaya|Anauk Mibaya]] * [[Shingon (nat)|Shingon]] * [[Shingwa]] * [[Shin Nemi]] (Ma Hnelay)
| group2 = [[:en:Hinduism|Hindu]] [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|nats]] | list2 = * [[Vishnu|Beikthano]] * [[:en:Brahma|Byamma]] * [[:en:Ganesha|Maha Peinne]] * [[:en:Chandi|Sandi]] * [[Shiva|Thiwa]] ([[:en:Ishvara|Paramethwa]]) * [[Thurathadi|Thuyathadi]] * [[:en:Kartikeya|Thukanda]]
| group3 = Other nats | list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle =
|group1 = Popa nats |list1 = * [[:en:Popa Medaw|Popa Medaw]] (Me Wunna) * [[Koyin Maung]] * [[Taungdaw Thakhinma]] |group2 = Ayeyarwady Delta nats |list2 = * [[U Shin Gyi]] * [[Kwin Paing Ahpo]] |group3 = Bago nats |list3 = *[[:en:Bago Medaw|Bago Medaw]] (Nankaraing Medaw) *[[Ko Aung Naing]] |group4 = Nine Towns nats |list4 = * Ko Myo Shin * Pale Yin (Amay Pale) * Hkuncho * Hkuntha |group5 = Lord of the</br>White Horse nats |list5 = * Yamma Myinbyushin * Kanni Myinbyushin * Shwepyay Myinbyushin * [[Shwe Sitthin|Shwesitthin Myinbyushin]] |group6 = Five Mother nats |list6 = * [[Ashay Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Anauk Medaw]] ([[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Amay Yay Yin]]) * [[Taung Medaw]] * [[Myauk Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Gyan|Amay Gyan]] }} | group4 = Miscellaneous | list4 = * [[Shin Upagutta]] * [[Sīvali|Shin Thiwali]] * [[:en:Panhtwar|Beikthano Nat]] * [[:en:Ponmagyi|Ponmagyi]] * [[:en:Bo Bo Gyi|Bo Bo Gyi]] * [[Koe Thein Shin]] * [[U Din Kyaw Khaung]] * [[:en:Avalokiteśvara|Lawka Nat]] * [[Lay Kyun Maung]] * [[:en:Ma Ngwe Taung|Ma Ngwe Taung]] * [[Medaw Lay Ba]] * [[:en:Mogaung Kyawzwa|Mogaung Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Mya Nan Nwe|Mya Nan Nwe]] * [[Pakhan U Min Gyaw]] * [[Shinma Aungphyu]] * [[:en:Ma Phae Wah|Ma Phae Wah]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings]] * [[:en:Akathaso|Akathaso]] * [[:en:Bhummaso|Bhummaso]] * [[Yokkaso]] * [[:en:Phra Mae Thorani|Wathondare]] * [[:en:Manimekhala|Mani Maykhala]] * [[:en:Kayin Maunghnama|Kayin Maunghnama]] * [[Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama]] * [[Pyelepyin Maunghnama]] }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Religion and belief navigational boxes]] [[Category:Myanmar navigational boxes|Nats]] }}</noinclude>

| group1 = Official pantheon | list1 = * [[Thagyamin]] ([[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra]]) * [[:en:Mahagiri|Mahagiri]] * [[:en:Hnamadawgyi|Hnamadawgyi]] * [[Shwe Nabay]] (Naga Medaw) * [[Thonbanhla]] * [[Taungoo Mingaung]] * [[:en:Tarabya of Ava|Mintara]] * [[Thandawgan]] * [[Shwe Nawrahta]] * [[:en:Aungzwamagyi|Aungzwamagyi]] * [[:en:Kyawswa I of Pinya|Ngazishin]] * [[Thihathu of Ava|Aung Pinle Hsinbyushin]] * [[Taungmagyi]] (Shin Nyo) * [[:en:Maungminshin|Maungminshin]] (Shin Byu) * [[Shindaw]] * [[:en:Nyaunggyin|Nyaunggyin]] * [[:en:Tabinshwehti|Tabinshwehti]] * [[:en:Minye Aungdin|Minye Aungdin]] * [[Shwe Sitthin]] * [[:en:Medaw Shwezaga|Medaw Shwezaga]] * [[:en:Maung Po Tu|Maung Po Tu]] * [[Yun Bayin]] (Mekuti) * [[:en:Maung Minbyu|Maung Minbyu]] * [[:en:Mandalay Bodaw|Mandalay Bodaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw]] * [[:en:Mintha Maungshin|Mintha Maungshin]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung|Htibyuhsaung]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung Medaw|Htibyuhsaung Medaw]] * [[:en:Pareinma Shin Mingaung|Pareinma Shin Mingaung]] * [[:en:Min Sithu|Min Sithu]] * [[:en:Min Kyawzwa|Min Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Myaukhpet Shinma|Myaukhpet Shinma]] * [[:en:Anauk Mibaya|Anauk Mibaya]] * [[Shingon (nat)|Shingon]] * [[Shingwa]] * [[Shin Nemi]] (Ma Hnelay)
| group2 = [[:en:Hinduism|Hindu]] [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|nats]] | list2 = * [[Vishnu|Beikthano]] * [[:en:Brahma|Byamma]] * [[:en:Ganesha|Maha Peinne]] * [[:en:Chandi|Sandi]] * [[Shiva|Thiwa]] ([[:en:Ishvara|Paramethwa]]) * [[Thurathadi|Thuyathadi]] * [[:en:Kartikeya|Thukanda]]
| group3 = Other nats | list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle =
|group1 = Popa nats |list1 = * [[:en:Popa Medaw|Popa Medaw]] (Me Wunna) * [[Koyin Maung]] * [[Taungdaw Thakhinma]] |group2 = Ayeyarwady Delta nats |list2 = * [[:en:U Shin Gyi|U Shin Gyi]] * [[Kwin Paing Ahpo]] |group3 = Bago nats |list3 = *[[:en:Bago Medaw|Bago Medaw]] (Nankaraing Medaw) *[[Ko Aung Naing]] |group4 = Nine Towns nats |list4 = * Ko Myo Shin * Pale Yin (Amay Pale) * Hkuncho * Hkuntha |group5 = Lord of the</br>White Horse nats |list5 = * Yamma Myinbyushin * Kanni Myinbyushin * Shwepyay Myinbyushin * [[Shwe Sitthin|Shwesitthin Myinbyushin]] |group6 = Five Mother nats |list6 = * [[Ashay Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Anauk Medaw]] ([[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Amay Yay Yin]]) * [[Taung Medaw]] * [[Myauk Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Gyan|Amay Gyan]] }} | group4 = Miscellaneous | list4 = * [[Shin Upagutta]] * [[Sīvali|Shin Thiwali]] * [[:en:Panhtwar|Beikthano Nat]] * [[:en:Ponmagyi|Ponmagyi]] * [[:en:Bo Bo Gyi|Bo Bo Gyi]] * [[Koe Thein Shin]] * [[:en:U Din Kyaw Khaung|U Din Kyaw Khaung]] * [[:en:Avalokiteśvara|Lawka Nat]] * [[Lay Kyun Maung]] * [[:en:Ma Ngwe Taung|Ma Ngwe Taung]] * [[Medaw Lay Ba]] * [[:en:Mogaung Kyawzwa|Mogaung Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Mya Nan Nwe|Mya Nan Nwe]] * [[Pakhan U Min Gyaw]] * [[Shinma Aungphyu]] * [[:en:Ma Phae Wah|Ma Phae Wah]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings]] * [[:en:Akathaso|Akathaso]] * [[:en:Bhummaso|Bhummaso]] * [[Yokkaso]] * [[:en:Phra Mae Thorani|Wathondare]] * [[:en:Manimekhala|Mani Maykhala]] * [[:en:Kayin Maunghnama|Kayin Maunghnama]] * [[Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama]] * [[:en:Pyelepyin Maunghnama|Pyelepyin Maunghnama]] }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

| group1 = Official pantheon | list1 = * [[Thagyamin]] ([[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra]]) * [[:en:Mahagiri|Mahagiri]] * [[:en:Hnamadawgyi|Hnamadawgyi]] * [[Shwe Nabay]] (Naga Medaw) * [[Thonbanhla]] * [[:en:Taungoo Mingaung|Taungoo Mingaung]] * [[:en:Tarabya of Ava|Mintara]] * [[Thandawgan]] * [[Shwe Nawrahta]] * [[:en:Aungzwamagyi|Aungzwamagyi]] * [[:en:Kyawswa I of Pinya|Ngazishin]] * [[Thihathu of Ava|Aung Pinle Hsinbyushin]] * [[:en:Taungmagyi|Taungmagyi]] (Shin Nyo) * [[:en:Maungminshin|Maungminshin]] (Shin Byu) * [[Shindaw]] * [[:en:Nyaunggyin|Nyaunggyin]] * [[:en:Tabinshwehti|Tabinshwehti]] * [[:en:Minye Aungdin|Minye Aungdin]] * [[Shwe Sitthin]] * [[:en:Medaw Shwezaga|Medaw Shwezaga]] * [[:en:Maung Po Tu|Maung Po Tu]] * [[Yun Bayin]] (Mekuti) * [[:en:Maung Minbyu|Maung Minbyu]] * [[:en:Mandalay Bodaw|Mandalay Bodaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw]] * [[:en:Mintha Maungshin|Mintha Maungshin]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung|Htibyuhsaung]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung Medaw|Htibyuhsaung Medaw]] * [[:en:Pareinma Shin Mingaung|Pareinma Shin Mingaung]] * [[:en:Min Sithu|Min Sithu]] * [[:en:Min Kyawzwa|Min Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Myaukhpet Shinma|Myaukhpet Shinma]] * [[:en:Anauk Mibaya|Anauk Mibaya]] * [[Shingon (nat)|Shingon]] * [[Shingwa]] * [[Shin Nemi]] (Ma Hnelay)
| group2 = [[:en:Hinduism|Hindu]] [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|nats]] | list2 = * [[:en:Vishnu|Beikthano]] * [[:en:Brahma|Byamma]] * [[:en:Ganesha|Maha Peinne]] * [[:en:Chandi|Sandi]] * [[Shiva|Thiwa]] ([[:en:Ishvara|Paramethwa]]) * [[Thurathadi|Thuyathadi]] * [[:en:Kartikeya|Thukanda]]
| group3 = Other nats | list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle =
|group1 = Popa nats |list1 = * [[:en:Popa Medaw|Popa Medaw]] (Me Wunna) * [[Koyin Maung]] * [[:en:Taungdaw Thakhinma|Taungdaw Thakhinma]] |group2 = Ayeyarwady Delta nats |list2 = * [[:en:U Shin Gyi|U Shin Gyi]] * [[Kwin Paing Ahpo]] |group3 = Bago nats |list3 = *[[:en:Bago Medaw|Bago Medaw]] (Nankaraing Medaw) *[[Ko Aung Naing]] |group4 = Nine Towns nats |list4 = * Ko Myo Shin * Pale Yin (Amay Pale) * Hkuncho * Hkuntha |group5 = Lord of the</br>White Horse nats |list5 = * Yamma Myinbyushin * Kanni Myinbyushin * Shwepyay Myinbyushin * [[Shwe Sitthin|Shwesitthin Myinbyushin]] |group6 = Five Mother nats |list6 = * [[Ashay Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Anauk Medaw]] ([[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Amay Yay Yin]]) * [[Taung Medaw]] * [[Myauk Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Gyan|Amay Gyan]] }} | group4 = Miscellaneous | list4 = * [[Shin Upagutta]] * [[Sīvali|Shin Thiwali]] * [[:en:Panhtwar|Beikthano Nat]] * [[:en:Ponmagyi|Ponmagyi]] * [[:en:Bo Bo Gyi|Bo Bo Gyi]] * [[Koe Thein Shin]] * [[:en:U Din Kyaw Khaung|U Din Kyaw Khaung]] * [[:en:Avalokiteśvara|Lawka Nat]] * [[Lay Kyun Maung]] * [[:en:Ma Ngwe Taung|Ma Ngwe Taung]] * [[Medaw Lay Ba]] * [[:en:Mogaung Kyawzwa|Mogaung Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Mya Nan Nwe|Mya Nan Nwe]] * [[Pakhan U Min Gyaw]] * [[Shinma Aungphyu]] * [[:en:Ma Phae Wah|Ma Phae Wah]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings]] * [[:en:Akathaso|Akathaso]] * [[:en:Bhummaso|Bhummaso]] * [[:en:Yokkaso|Yokkaso]] * [[:en:Phra Mae Thorani|Wathondare]] * [[:en:Manimekhala|Mani Maykhala]] * [[:en:Kayin Maunghnama|Kayin Maunghnama]] * [[Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama]] * [[:en:Pyelepyin Maunghnama|Pyelepyin Maunghnama]] }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

| group1 = Official pantheon | list1 = * [[:en:Thagyamin|Thagyamin]] ([[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra]]) * [[:en:Mahagiri|Mahagiri]] * [[:en:Hnamadawgyi|Hnamadawgyi]] * [[Shwe Nabay]] (Naga Medaw) * [[:en:Thonbanhla|Thonbanhla]] * [[:en:Taungoo Mingaung|Taungoo Mingaung]] * [[:en:Tarabya of Ava|Mintara]] * [[:en:Thandawgan|Thandawgan]] * [[Shwe Nawrahta]] * [[:en:Aungzwamagyi|Aungzwamagyi]] * [[:en:Kyawswa I of Pinya|Ngazishin]] * [[:en:Thihathu of Ava|Aung Pinle Hsinbyushin]] * [[:en:Taungmagyi|Taungmagyi]] (Shin Nyo) * [[:en:Maungminshin|Maungminshin]] (Shin Byu) * [[:en:Shindaw|Shindaw]] * [[:en:Nyaunggyin|Nyaunggyin]] * [[:en:Tabinshwehti|Tabinshwehti]] * [[:en:Minye Aungdin|Minye Aungdin]] * [[Shwe Sitthin]] * [[:en:Medaw Shwezaga|Medaw Shwezaga]] * [[:en:Maung Po Tu|Maung Po Tu]] * [[:en:Yun Bayin|Yun Bayin]] (Mekuti) * [[:en:Maung Minbyu|Maung Minbyu]] * [[:en:Mandalay Bodaw|Mandalay Bodaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw]] * [[Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw]] * [[:en:Mintha Maungshin|Mintha Maungshin]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung|Htibyuhsaung]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung Medaw|Htibyuhsaung Medaw]] * [[:en:Pareinma Shin Mingaung|Pareinma Shin Mingaung]] * [[:en:Min Sithu|Min Sithu]] * [[:en:Min Kyawzwa|Min Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Myaukhpet Shinma|Myaukhpet Shinma]] * [[:en:Anauk Mibaya|Anauk Mibaya]] * [[Shingon (nat)|Shingon]] * [[Shingwa]] * [[:en:Shin Nemi|Shin Nemi]] (Ma Hnelay)
| group2 = [[:en:Hinduism|Hindu]] [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|nats]] | list2 = * [[:en:Vishnu|Beikthano]] * [[:en:Brahma|Byamma]] * [[:en:Ganesha|Maha Peinne]] * [[:en:Chandi|Sandi]] * [[Shiva|Thiwa]] ([[:en:Ishvara|Paramethwa]]) * [[:en:Thurathadi|Thuyathadi]] * [[:en:Kartikeya|Thukanda]]
| group3 = Other nats | list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle =
|group1 = Popa nats |list1 = * [[:en:Popa Medaw|Popa Medaw]] (Me Wunna) * [[Koyin Maung]] * [[:en:Taungdaw Thakhinma|Taungdaw Thakhinma]] |group2 = Ayeyarwady Delta nats |list2 = * [[:en:U Shin Gyi|U Shin Gyi]] * [[Kwin Paing Ahpo]] |group3 = Bago nats |list3 = *[[:en:Bago Medaw|Bago Medaw]] (Nankaraing Medaw) *[[Ko Aung Naing]] |group4 = Nine Towns nats |list4 = * Ko Myo Shin * Pale Yin (Amay Pale) * Hkuncho * Hkuntha |group5 = Lord of the</br>White Horse nats |list5 = * Yamma Myinbyushin * Kanni Myinbyushin * Shwepyay Myinbyushin * [[Shwe Sitthin|Shwesitthin Myinbyushin]] |group6 = Five Mother nats |list6 = * [[Ashay Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Anauk Medaw]] ([[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Amay Yay Yin]]) * [[Taung Medaw]] * [[Myauk Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Gyan|Amay Gyan]] }} | group4 = Miscellaneous | list4 = * [[:en:Shin Upagutta|Shin Upagutta]] * [[Sīvali|Shin Thiwali]] * [[:en:Panhtwar|Beikthano Nat]] * [[:en:Ponmagyi|Ponmagyi]] * [[:en:Bo Bo Gyi|Bo Bo Gyi]] * [[Koe Thein Shin]] * [[:en:U Din Kyaw Khaung|U Din Kyaw Khaung]] * [[:en:Avalokiteśvara|Lawka Nat]] * [[Lay Kyun Maung]] * [[:en:Ma Ngwe Taung|Ma Ngwe Taung]] * [[Medaw Lay Ba]] * [[:en:Mogaung Kyawzwa|Mogaung Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Mya Nan Nwe|Mya Nan Nwe]] * [[Pakhan U Min Gyaw]] * [[Shinma Aungphyu]] * [[:en:Ma Phae Wah|Ma Phae Wah]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings]] * [[:en:Akathaso|Akathaso]] * [[:en:Bhummaso|Bhummaso]] * [[:en:Yokkaso|Yokkaso]] * [[:en:Phra Mae Thorani|Wathondare]] * [[:en:Manimekhala|Mani Maykhala]] * [[:en:Kayin Maunghnama|Kayin Maunghnama]] * [[Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama]] * [[:en:Pyelepyin Maunghnama|Pyelepyin Maunghnama]] }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

| group1 = Official pantheon | list1 = * [[:en:Thagyamin|Thagyamin]] ([[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra]]) * [[:en:Mahagiri|Mahagiri]] * [[:en:Hnamadawgyi|Hnamadawgyi]] * [[:en:Shwe Nabay|Shwe Nabay]] (Naga Medaw) * [[:en:Thonbanhla|Thonbanhla]] * [[:en:Taungoo Mingaung|Taungoo Mingaung]] * [[:en:Tarabya of Ava|Mintara]] * [[:en:Thandawgan|Thandawgan]] * [[Shwe Nawrahta]] * [[:en:Aungzwamagyi|Aungzwamagyi]] * [[:en:Kyawswa I of Pinya|Ngazishin]] * [[:en:Thihathu of Ava|Aung Pinle Hsinbyushin]] * [[:en:Taungmagyi|Taungmagyi]] (Shin Nyo) * [[:en:Maungminshin|Maungminshin]] (Shin Byu) * [[:en:Shindaw|Shindaw]] * [[:en:Nyaunggyin|Nyaunggyin]] * [[:en:Tabinshwehti|Tabinshwehti]] * [[:en:Minye Aungdin|Minye Aungdin]] * [[Shwe Sitthin]] * [[:en:Medaw Shwezaga|Medaw Shwezaga]] * [[:en:Maung Po Tu|Maung Po Tu]] * [[:en:Yun Bayin|Yun Bayin]] (Mekuti) * [[:en:Maung Minbyu|Maung Minbyu]] * [[:en:Mandalay Bodaw|Mandalay Bodaw]] * [[:en:Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw|Shwe Hpyin Naungdaw]] * [[:en:Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw|Shwe Hpyin Nyidaw]] * [[:en:Mintha Maungshin|Mintha Maungshin]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung|Htibyuhsaung]] * [[:en:Htibyuhsaung Medaw|Htibyuhsaung Medaw]] * [[:en:Pareinma Shin Mingaung|Pareinma Shin Mingaung]] * [[:en:Min Sithu|Min Sithu]] * [[:en:Min Kyawzwa|Min Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Myaukhpet Shinma|Myaukhpet Shinma]] * [[:en:Anauk Mibaya|Anauk Mibaya]] * [[:en:Shingon (nat)|Shingon]] * [[:en:Shingwa|Shingwa]] * [[:en:Shin Nemi|Shin Nemi]] (Ma Hnelay)
| group2 = [[:en:Hinduism|Hindu]] [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|nats]] | list2 = * [[:en:Vishnu|Beikthano]] * [[:en:Brahma|Byamma]] * [[:en:Ganesha|Maha Peinne]] * [[:en:Chandi|Sandi]] * [[:en:Shiva|Thiwa]] ([[:en:Ishvara|Paramethwa]]) * [[:en:Thurathadi|Thuyathadi]] * [[:en:Kartikeya|Thukanda]]
| group3 = Other nats | list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle =
|group1 = Popa nats |list1 = * [[:en:Popa Medaw|Popa Medaw]] (Me Wunna) * [[Koyin Maung]] * [[:en:Taungdaw Thakhinma|Taungdaw Thakhinma]] |group2 = Ayeyarwady Delta nats |list2 = * [[:en:U Shin Gyi|U Shin Gyi]] * [[Kwin Paing Ahpo]] |group3 = Bago nats |list3 = *[[:en:Bago Medaw|Bago Medaw]] (Nankaraing Medaw) *[[Ko Aung Naing]] |group4 = Nine Towns nats |list4 = * Ko Myo Shin * Pale Yin (Amay Pale) * Hkuncho * Hkuntha |group5 = Lord of the</br>White Horse nats |list5 = * Yamma Myinbyushin * Kanni Myinbyushin * Shwepyay Myinbyushin * [[Shwe Sitthin|Shwesitthin Myinbyushin]] |group6 = Five Mother nats |list6 = * [[Ashay Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Anauk Medaw]] ([[:en:Amay Yay Yin|Amay Yay Yin]]) * [[Taung Medaw]] * [[Myauk Medaw]] * [[:en:Amay Gyan|Amay Gyan]] }} | group4 = Miscellaneous | list4 = * [[:en:Shin Upagutta|Shin Upagutta]] * [[:en:Sīvali|Shin Thiwali]] * [[:en:Panhtwar|Beikthano Nat]] * [[:en:Ponmagyi|Ponmagyi]] * [[:en:Bo Bo Gyi|Bo Bo Gyi]] * [[Koe Thein Shin]] * [[:en:U Din Kyaw Khaung|U Din Kyaw Khaung]] * [[:en:Avalokiteśvara|Lawka Nat]] * [[Lay Kyun Maung]] * [[:en:Ma Ngwe Taung|Ma Ngwe Taung]] * [[Medaw Lay Ba]] * [[:en:Mogaung Kyawzwa|Mogaung Kyawzwa]] * [[:en:Mya Nan Nwe|Mya Nan Nwe]] * [[Pakhan U Min Gyaw]] * [[:en:Shinma Aungphyu|Shinma Aungphyu]] * [[:en:Ma Phae Wah|Ma Phae Wah]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings]] * [[:en:Akathaso|Akathaso]] * [[:en:Bhummaso|Bhummaso]] * [[:en:Yokkaso|Yokkaso]] * [[:en:Phra Mae Thorani|Wathondare]] * [[:en:Manimekhala|Mani Maykhala]] * [[:en:Kayin Maunghnama|Kayin Maunghnama]] * [[:en:Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama|Shwe Kyunbin Maunghnama]] * [[:en:Pyelepyin Maunghnama|Pyelepyin Maunghnama]] }}<noinclude>
